description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named switch that runs on push to master, feature/gh-actions-switch-cache, and tags, as well as on pull requests and workflow dispatch. In an ubuntu-latest job with a devkitpro/devkita64 container, install git, checkout the repository and submodules, grab assets, restore modified dates, configure packaging names based on branch and tag, check for prerelease, list build cache restore keys, handle build cache, run a build script, and create a release if a tag is present.
